name: consulting agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For consulting agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual timesheet tracking causes billing delays. We automate timesheet and attendance tracking instead of manual timesheet entry and tracking.
problem_solved: Manual timesheet tracking leads to billing delays and inaccurate invoicing.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual timesheet tracking leads to billing delays and inaccurate invoicing.
